highlights.summary: Trio v0.8.2 release patch: make OmnipodKit the sole Omnipod driver; consolidate Omnipod onboarding; Live Activity visual and localization fixes; watch app back-sync/stale-data responsiveness fixes; Stats → Meals macros display fix; CI/App dev version increments.
highlights.userFacingImpact: Users will see only OmnipodKit when adding/onboarding Omnipod pumps; Live Activity will render active temp targets as a green band with a named badge, indefinite overrides will render correctly, and widget/COB labels are corrected/localized; Apple Watch responsiveness and recovery from stale data should improve; Meals stats will correctly show today's carbs, fat, and protein. App dev version was incremented in CI/config files.

items.summary: Trio v0.8.2 release patch: make OmnipodKit the sole Omnipod driver; consolidate Omnipod onboarding; Live Activity visual and localization fixes; watch app back-sync/stale-data responsiveness fixes; Stats → Meals macros display fix; CI/App dev version increments.
items.userFacingImpact: Users will see only OmnipodKit when adding/onboarding Omnipod pumps; Live Activity will render active temp targets as a green band with a named badge, indefinite overrides will render correctly, and widget/COB labels are corrected/localized; Apple Watch responsiveness and recovery from stale data should improve; Meals stats will correctly show today's carbs, fat, and protein. App dev version was incremented in CI/config files.

items.summary: Correct Carbs-on-Board label and make Live Activity widget item labels localizable; add corresponding localized string entries.
items.userFacingImpact: The Carbs on Board label is corrected to "Carbs on Board (COB)" and Live Activity widget labels are prepared for localization so they can appear in other languages where translations exist.

items.summary: Add @kingst and @marionbarker to the repository .github/CODEOWNERS file.
items.userFacingImpact: No runtime or functional behavior changes. This updates repository ownership/approval metadata so @kingst and @marionbarker are added as code owners and may be requested/referenced for reviews.

includedPullRequests.title: Trio v0.8.2 patch release
includedPullRequests.body:
## What's Changed At A Glance

- **OmnipodKit is now the sole Omnipod driver** — OmniBLE and OmniKit submodules removed; "All Omnipod Types" is the only Omnipod entry in Add Pump and Onboarding
- **Live Activity Enhancements / Fixes:**
   -  Temp target on chart — active temp targets now render as a green band on the Live Activity chart, with a named badge alongside the override badge
   - Ondefinite override fix — overrides with no set duration no longer collapse the chart's rule mark to the current moment
   - COB label and widget string fixes — corrected the COB string and localized all widget item labels
- **Watch connectivity fix** — massively improve watch performance; stale data on watch now updates in just a moment vs. getting stuck during processing.
- **Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day** — today's carbs, fat, and protein now always appear correctly in the Meals chart
---

## Full List of PRs in `0.8.2`

| PR | Title | Author |
|---|---|---|
| [#1180](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1180) | Add temp target display to Live Activity lock screen widget | [@t1dude](https://github.com/t1dude) |
| [#1182](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1182) | Update CODEOWNERS: add @marionbarker and @kingst | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1184](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1184) | Fix COB string, localize Live Activity widget item labels | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1188](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1188) | Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1190](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1190) | Fix watch app back-sync after long staleness | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1192](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1192) | Fix indefinite override not drawn in Live Activity chart | [@t1dude](https://github.com/t1dude) |
| [#1200](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1200) | Remove Legacy Omnipod Submodules (OmniKit, OmniBLE) | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |

---

## Contributors

@dnzxy @t1dude @marv-out

## What's Changed At A Glance

- **OmnipodKit is now the sole Omnipod driver** — OmniBLE and OmniKit submodules removed; "All Omnipod Types" is the only Omnipod entry in Add Pump and Onboarding
- **Live Activity Enhancements / Fixes:**
   -  Temp target on chart — active temp targets now render as a green band on the Live Activity chart, with a named badge alongside the override badge
   - Ondefinite override fix — overrides with no set duration no longer collapse the chart's rule mark to the current moment
   - COB label and widget string fixes — corrected the COB string and localized all widget item labels
- **Watch connectivity fix** — massively improve watch performance; stale data on watch now updates in just a moment vs. getting stuck during processing.
- **Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day** — today's carbs, fat, and protein now always appear correctly in the Meals chart
